title: E-commerce Product Listing with Dynamic Filtering and Shopping Cart

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: E-commerce Product Listing with Dynamic Filtering and Shopping Cart

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'><defs><linearGradient id='gradient' x1='0' y1='0' x2='0' y2='1'><stop offset='0%' stop-color='#B7D7CD'/><stop offset='100%' stop-color='#C06C88'/></linearGradient></defs><rect x='10' y='10' width='380' height='280' rx='10' fill='#090a0f'/><rect x='30' y='30' width='340' height='240' rx='10' fill='url(#gradient)' opacity='0.5'/><g fill='#fff' font-size='24'><text x='20' y='90' text-anchor='start'>Product Listing</text><text x='20' y='130' text-anchor='start'>Filters</text><text x='20' y='170' text-anchor='start'>Shopping Cart</text></g><rect x='20' y='210' width='360' height='30' rx='5' fill='#C06C88'/><rect x='40' y='235' width='320' height='10' rx='5' fill='#C06C88'/><rect x='20' y='220' width='60' height='20' rx='5' fill='#C06C88'/><path d='M20,220h340v10h-340zm0,5h340v10h-340'/><path d='M40,235h280v-10h-280'/><g fill='#fff' font-size='18'><text x='25' y='230' text-anchor='start'>Price Range</text><text x='45' y='260' text-anchor='start'>Category</text></g></svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must be fully interactive with state updates
Filters should update the product list in real-time

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: E-commerce Product Listing with Dynamic Filtering and Shopping Cart

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, filter functionality, and shopping cart behavior.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
